response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform experience; their work is primarily in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with minimal evidence of cloud compute leadership or distributed systems architecture.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems
Demonstrated mentorship and workshop leadership in testing and dev-ops practices
Active open-source contributions and technical communication skills
concerns: No evidence of 8+ years of C++ programming as required
Lacks demonstrable experience with cloud compute platforms or distributed systems at scale
No prior technical leadership role mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers
